tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624AssociateServiceQuotaTemplate.associateServiceQuotaTemplate
tools.description: Associates your quota request template with your organization. When a new account is created in your organization, the quota increase requests in the template are automatically applied to the account. You can add a quota increase request for any adjustable quota to your template.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624DeleteServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestFromTemplate.deleteServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestFromTemplate
tools.description: Deletes the quota increase request for the specified quota from your quota request template.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624DisassociateServiceQuotaTemplate.disassociateServiceQuotaTemplate
tools.description: Disables your quota request template. After a template is disabled, the quota increase requests in the template are not applied to new accounts in your organization. Disabling a quota request template does not apply its quota increase requests.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624GetAssociationForServiceQuotaTemplate.getAssociationForServiceQuotaTemplate
tools.description: Retrieves the status of the association for the quota request template.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624GetAwsDefaultServiceQuota.getAwsDefaultServiceQuota
tools.description: Retrieves the default value for the specified quota. The default value does not reflect any quota increases.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624GetRequestedServiceQuotaChange.getRequestedServiceQuotaChange
tools.description: Retrieves information about the specified quota increase request.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624GetServiceQuota.getServiceQuota
tools.description: Retrieves the applied quota value for the specified quota. For some quotas, only the default values are available. If the applied quota value is not available for a quota, the quota is not retrieved.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624GetServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestFromTemplate.getServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestFromTemplate
tools.description: Retrieves information about the specified quota increase request in your quota request template.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624ListAwsDefaultServiceQuotas.listAwsDefaultServiceQuotas
tools.description: Lists the default values for the quotas for the specified AWS service. A default value does not reflect any quota increases.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624ListRequestedServiceQuotaChangeHistory.listRequestedServiceQuotaChangeHistory
tools.description: Retrieves the quota increase requests for the specified service.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624ListRequestedServiceQuotaChangeHistoryByQuota.listRequestedServiceQuotaChangeHistoryByQuota
tools.description: Retrieves the quota increase requests for the specified quota.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624ListServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestsInTemplate.listServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestsInTemplate
tools.description: Lists the quota increase requests in the specified quota request template.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624ListServiceQuotas.listServiceQuotas
tools.description: Lists the applied quota values for the specified AWS service. For some quotas, only the default values are available. If the applied quota value is not available for a quota, the quota is not retrieved.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624ListServices.listServices
tools.description: Lists the names and codes for the services integrated with Service Quotas.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624ListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Returns a list of the tags assigned to the specified applied quota.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624PutServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestIntoTemplate.putServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestIntoTemplate
tools.description: Adds a quota increase request to your quota request template.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624RequestServiceQuotaIncrease.requestServiceQuotaIncrease
tools.description: Submits a quota increase request for the specified quota.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624TagResource.tagResource
tools.description: Adds tags to the specified applied quota. You can include one or more tags to add to the quota.

tools.name: xAmzTargetServiceQuotasV20190624UntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Removes tags from the specified applied quota. You can specify one or more tags to remove.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
